creator: crest@rlwinm.de
text:
Created attachment 234939
Patch updating all ported skarnet.org software to the summer 2022 release

The skarnet software suite consists of several parts that have to be kept in sync. The attached patch updates all ports skarnet.org software (that I maintain) to the latest release. If any committer looking at this prefers one patch per port I can of course switch back to one patch per port.
